speaker: Dr. Goldfine
content: Bree, Rex just called. He won't be able to meet you here today, apparently, there was an emergency at the hospital.
mark: will be able to 将来能够、将来有能力做某事
emergency n. 突发事件，紧急情况；急诊病人

speaker: Bree
content: Oh, Well, I wish he'd called me.

speaker: Dr. Goldfine
content: He suggested perhaps you'd like to meet with me by yourself? You've been very quiet in our joint sessions.
mark: would like to 想要或希望做某事
meet sb 更侧重于偶然相遇或普通的见面；
meet with sb 更强调有目的、正式的会面，或者表达遭遇某种情况。
joint adj. 联合的，共同的，共有的；连带的
session. （某项活动的）一段时间，一场；（议会等的）会议，（法庭的）开庭；学年，上课时间；in session 会议进行中：正在进行正式会议的过程。

speaker: Bree
content: What? No, thank you. I have some things that I need to do today.

speaker: Bree
content: Dr. Goldfine, there is something you can do for me.

speaker: Bree
mark: take off your coat 脱下你的外套 take off 脱下; 起飞; 脱离; 扣除; 模仿 coat n. 外套，大衣；
